title: [COBBLEMON] Ruins Enemies - Undertale
description: This mod is an addon to the Cobblemon mod, adds enemies from Undertale as collectable Pokémon.
body:
There are many Cobblemon addons but his one is inspired by Undertale.
It adds various new Pokémon to play with and battle other players/Pokémon!

This mod includes:

Vegetoid  to Parsnik                            ✓
Whimsun to Whimsalot                       ✗
Froggit     to Final Froggit                   ✓
Moldsmal to Moldessa or Moldbygg  ✗
Loox         to Astigmatism                   ✗
Migosp     to Migospel                         ✗

Done = ✓
In Work = ✗

Spawn Commands:

/pokespawn froggit
/pokespawn finalfroggit
/pokespawn vegetoid
/pokespawn parsnik

HOW TO DOWNLOAD
Put the .zip folder in resource packs
Put the .zip folder in datapacks (in save folder)

THIS ADDON IS IN BETA, WE'RE STILL WORKING ON IT.
join the cobblemon discord for more info about the project and other stuff
